resources.string: execute arbitrary commands within &TERMUX_APP_NAME; environment and access files
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; was unable to install the bootstrap packages.
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; can only be run as the primary user. \nBootstrap binaries compiled for &TERMUX_APP_NAME; have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:\n%1$s.

&TERMUX_APP_NAME; cannot be installed on portable/external/removable sd card on your device. \nBootstrap binaries compiled for &TERMUX_APP_NAME; have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:\n%1$s.
Close down existing ones before creating new.

Hermes CLI is not installed.

Place the hermes binary at:
%1$s
and make it executable:
chmod +x %1$s
Click URL to copy or long press to open
No URL found in the terminal.
Add termux debug info to report?
The &TERMUX_STYLING_APP_NAME; Plugin App is not installed.
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; requires \"Display over other apps\" permission to start terminal sessions from background on Android >= 10. Grants it from Settings -> Apps -> &TERMUX_APP_NAME; -> Advanced
Invalid execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Unsupported execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Unsupported execution command shell create mode to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Shell name not set but `%1$s` shell create mode passed
Invalid execution command runner to RunCommandService: `%1$s`
Visit %1$s for more info on RUN_COMMAND Intent usage.
Failed to start TermuxService. Check logcat for exception message.
Failed to start TermuxService while app is in background due to android bg restrictions.
Logs will not have entries for terminal view keys. (Default)
Logcat logs will have entries for terminal view keys. These are very verbose and should be disabled under normal circumstances or will cause performance issues.
Disable flashes and notifications for plugin errors.
Show flashes and notifications for plugin errors. (Default)
Soft Keyboard Only If No Hardware
Soft keyboard will be enabled even if hardware keyboard is connected. (Default)
Soft keyboard will be enabled only if no hardware keyboard is connected.
Terminal margin adjustment will be disabled.

Terminal margin adjustment will be enabled. It should be enabled to try to fix the issue where soft keyboard covers part of extra keys/terminal view. If it causes screen flickering on your devices, then disable it. (Default)
Set AI provider, API key, and model
Start, stop, or restart the Hermes gateway
Reset all Hermes settings to defaults
This will delete your Hermes configuration files. API keys and settings will be lost.
Save settings to a file for backup
Restore settings from a backup file
This will overwrite your current settings. Continue?
Check if a newer version of Hermes Agent is available
Hermes Agent is up to date (%1$s)
Model name to use (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4-6)
Custom endpoint URL (for Ollama or compatible APIs)
Verify your API key and model are working
Connection successful (no API key needed for %1$s).
Authentication failed — check your API key.
Network error — check your internet connection.
Please enter an API key first.
Connection OK but response was slow (%1$dms). Model may be under load.
API key valid but model did not respond. Check model name.
Start Hermes gateway automatically when app opens
This will delete all gateway log entries.
This will delete all gateway session records.
Save current LLM settings as a named profile
API key missing — tap to configure your LLM provider
No IM platform configured — tap to set up messaging
Hermes not installed — tap to start installation
Gateway stopped — tap to start it
No system prompt set — tap to add one
Multiple issues found — tap to view
No API key set — tap to configure
Gateway is not running — tap to start
Hermes not installed — tap to install
No IM platform configured — tap to set up
No system prompt — tap to set one
Choose a template to auto-configure your AI assistant. You can always customize settings later.
Expert programmer that writes clean code, explains concepts, and helps debug issues.
Temperature: 0.2 · Max tokens: 4096 · Best for: programming help

You are an expert software engineer. Write clean, efficient, well-documented code. Explain your reasoning clearly. When debugging, identify root causes and suggest fixes. Follow best practices and design patterns appropriate to the language and framework.
Imaginative writer for stories, brainstorming, and creative projects.
Temperature: 0.9 · Max tokens: 2048 · Best for: creative writing

You are a creative and imaginative writer. Think outside the box, offer unique perspectives, and express ideas vividly. Help with stories, poetry, brainstorming, and creative projects. Be expressive and engaging.
Patient tutor that explains concepts clearly and helps with learning.
Temperature: 0.7 · Max tokens: 2048 · Best for: learning and tutoring

You are a patient and encouraging tutor. Explain concepts clearly using simple language and examples. Break down complex topics into understandable parts. Ask follow-up questions to check understanding. Adapt your teaching style to the learner.
Professional email composer for work and personal communication.
Temperature: 0.5 · Max tokens: 1024 · Best for: email and communication
You are a professional email writer. Compose clear, concise, and well-structured emails. Match the appropriate tone (formal, semi-formal, casual) based on context. Keep emails focused and actionable.
Analytical assistant for research, fact-checking, and deep analysis.
Temperature: 0.3 · Max tokens: 4096 · Best for: research and analysis

You are a thorough research assistant. Provide accurate, well-sourced information. Analyze topics from multiple perspectives. Present findings in a structured format. Always note limitations and uncertainties. Be precise and factual.
Choose a pre-configured template for your use case
Hermes can connect to Telegram so you can chat with your AI assistant directly in Telegram messages.
Comma-separated user IDs (leave empty to allow all)

How to get your bot token:

1. Open Telegram and search for @BotFather
2. Send /newbot to create a new bot
3. Choose a name and username for your bot
4. Copy the bot token provided by BotFather
Verify your bot token is valid by testing the connection.
Bot token is valid! Your Telegram bot is ready.
Invalid bot token — please check and try again.

Next steps:

• Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings
• Send a message to your bot on Telegram
• You can change settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Hermes can connect to Discord so you can chat with your AI assistant in Discord servers and DMs.
Paste your bot token from Discord Developer Portal
Comma-separated Discord user IDs (leave empty to allow all)

How to get your bot token:

1. Go to discord.com/developers/applications
2. Click "New Application" and name it
3. Go to "Bot" section and click "Reset Token"
4. Copy the bot token
5. Enable "Message Content Intent" under Bot > Privileged Gateway Intents
Verify your bot token is valid by testing the connection.
Bot token is valid! Your Discord bot is ready.
Invalid bot token — please check and try again.

Next steps:

• Invite your bot to your Discord server
• Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings
• Send a message to your bot on Discord
• You can change settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Configure event subscription so Feishu can send messages to your Hermes gateway. You need to set up a webhook URL in the Feishu developer console.

1. Open Feishu Developer Console → Your App → Events 2. Click "Add Event" 3. Subscribe to: im.message.receive_v1 4. Set the request URL to the webhook URL above 5. If using WebSocket mode, you can skip the URL setup 6. Make sure event permissions are enabled
Note: If you selected WebSocket connection mode, you do not need to configure a webhook URL. The gateway will connect to Feishu via WebSocket automatically.
Hermes can connect to Feishu (飞书) or Lark so you can chat with your AI assistant directly in messages. This wizard will guide you through the setup in a few simple steps.

What you'll do:

1. Choose your platform (Feishu or Lark)
2. Create a bot in the Developer Console
3. Enter your App credentials
4. Test the connection

⏱ Takes about 3–5 minutes
Select which platform you use. Feishu is for China, Lark is for international users.
Follow these steps in the Feishu Developer Console to create your bot app.
💡 Tip: After creating the app, go to \"Bot\" section and enable the bot capability. Then find your App ID and App Secret on the app\'s credentials page.

string-array.name: feishu_create_app_steps
string-array.item: Open the Developer Console by tapping the button below
Tap \"Create App\" and choose \"Bot\" as the app type
Enter a name for your bot (e.g. \"My Hermes Bot\")
Go to \"Bot\" section and enable bot capability
Copy the App ID and App Secret from the credentials page

resources.string: Scan the QR code below with Feishu to open the credentials page, or enter them manually.
Scan this QR code with Feishu to open the Developer Console:
App ID detected! Tap to fill: %1$s
Credentials look too short — please double-check
App ID and App Secret are required
Let\'s verify your configuration before saving. This tests that your credentials are correct.
Tap \"Test Connection\" to verify your credentials
Connection test passed! Your bot is ready.
Could not verify connection, but credentials look valid. You can continue and test later.

Next steps:

• Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings to begin receiving messages
• Send a message to your bot on Feishu to start chatting
• You can change these settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Hermes web server is not running. Start the gateway to enable the web UI.

Hermes Agent is not installed yet at:
%1$s

Please wait for the auto-install to complete.

Hermes connects AI assistants to your messaging apps. This wizard will help you get started in just a few steps.

You'll need:
• An API key from an AI provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
• Optionally, a messaging account (Feishu, Telegram, Discord)
Select your AI provider and enter your API key. This is required for Hermes to work.
You can connect Hermes to Feishu/Lark to chat with your AI assistant directly in messages. This step is optional — you can set it up later from Hermes Settings.
You can skip this step and configure Feishu later from Hermes Settings.
Almost there! Start the Hermes gateway to begin receiving messages from your connected platforms.
Gateway failed to start. You can try again from Settings.
You can skip this step and start the gateway later from Hermes Settings.
Hermes is ready to go. You can start the gateway from the Hermes Settings or use the Web UI tab.\n\nTo change your settings at any time, tap the Hermes icon in the sidebar.
No conversations found. Start a chat through your IM platform to see history here.
Grant notification permission for gateway service
Balanced — temperature 0.7, 2048 tokens. Good for general chat.
Creative — temperature 0.9, 2048 tokens. Imaginative and expressive.
Precise — temperature 0.2, 4096 tokens. Factual and analytical.
Code — temperature 0.2, 4096 tokens. Expert coding assistant.
Quick setup for common use cases
Enter the model name to use
Leave empty for default provider URL
Scan QR code to import config
Custom system prompt for the AI assistant
Open provider dashboard to get or manage your API key
Hermes is an AI assistant gateway that connects language models to messaging platforms.
1. Configure your LLM provider and API key\n2. Set up a messaging platform\n3. Start the gateway
Hermes supports Feishu/Lark, Telegram, and Discord.
Check the gateway log for errors. Make sure your API key is valid.
Scan QR code to fill credentials
Please enter a bot token first
Scan a QR code to fill credentials
No QR scanner app found. Please install one.
Check your internet connection and try again.

Getting Started
Hermes connects AI assistants to messaging platforms.

API Key Issues
Check your API key is correct.

Gateway Troubleshooting
Check gateway log for errors.
Send a test message through the gateway
This will overwrite your current configuration.
You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?
No log entries match the filter.
Export all settings to a JSON file
Import settings from a JSON file
This will overwrite your current settings. Continue?
Tip: Scan with your phone camera
Point your phone camera at the QR code on the Feishu developer console to quickly copy your App ID and Secret.
Credentials detected from QR code. Please verify they are correct.

This wizard will guide you through connecting your Feishu bot to Hermes. You will need:
• A Feishu/Lark account • Access to the Developer Console • Your App ID and App Secret
Enter your App ID and App Secret from the Feishu Developer Console.
Automatically restart gateway when it crashes
Maximum consecutive restart attempts before giving up
Seconds to wait before attempting restart
Hermes connects AI assistants to messaging platforms. Let us show you around.
Tap the Gateway tab to start/stop the Hermes gateway service.
Go to the LLM tab to set up your AI provider and API key.
Use the IM tab to connect Feishu, Telegram, or Discord.
Start the gateway and your AI assistant will begin responding.
Play sound for gateway status changes
Suppress non-critical notifications during specified hours
Configure agent behavior, memory, and session management
Auto-compress conversation context to save tokens
Trigger compression when context exceeds this ratio (0.1–0.9)
Maximum context window size in tokens
Seconds of inactivity before gateway times out
Enable detailed agent logging for debugging
Let the agent store personal notes across sessions
Let the agent build a profile of your preferences
When to automatically reset conversation sessions
Reset session after this many minutes of inactivity
Hour of day (0–23) to reset sessions
For Hermes to read messages, you MUST enable these Privileged Gateway Intents in the Discord Developer Portal:
Use this link to invite your bot to a Discord server. Replace YOUR_CLIENT_ID with your Application ID from the Developer Portal.
Configure Model Context Protocol servers for extended tools
Configure WhatsApp Business API for AI assistant
Hermes can connect to WhatsApp Business API so your AI assistant can respond to WhatsApp messages.

How to set up WhatsApp Business API:
1. Go to business.facebook.com and create a Business account 2. Go to WhatsApp Manager and create a phone number 3. Get the Phone Number ID from WhatsApp settings 4. Create a Permanent Access Token in App Dashboard 5. Enter the credentials below
Enter your WhatsApp Phone Number ID
Enter your WhatsApp Business Account ID
Testing connection to WhatsApp Business API…

Next steps:
• Configure webhook URL in Meta Developer Portal • Start the Hermes Gateway • Send a message to your WhatsApp Business number • You can change settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Updated to v%1$s. Restart gateway to apply.
